mapper.select: SELECT image_id AS imageId, review_id AS reviewId, image_url AS imageUrl FROM review_image WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY image_id ASC

SELECT ri.image_id AS imageId, ri.review_id AS reviewId, ri.image_url AS imageUrl FROM review_image ri INNER JOIN review r ON ri.review_id = r.review_id WHERE r.recipe_code = #{recipeCode} ORDER BY ri.image_id ASC
